name: All-Time Favorite Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the tomato soup, vinegar, vegetable oil, packed brown sugar, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, and hot sauce.
2. Set aside to allow flavors to meld.
3. Use the sauce to baste ribs, chicken, hamburgers, or steak during broiling or grilling.
4. Makes about 1 1/3 cups of sauce.
